name: medieval-store-root
description: Root orchestration for Medieval Store project

scripts.backend:start: docker exec -it trybesmith npm run start
scripts.backend:dev: docker exec -it trybesmith npm run dev
scripts.backend:test: docker exec -it trybesmith npm run test
scripts.backend:lint: docker exec -it trybesmith npm run lint
scripts.backend:restore: docker exec -it trybesmith npm run restore
